zh.Alnwick, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Longespée於大約1209年出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，她的父親William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury34歲，母親Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury24歲。她和Robert de Ros 1st Baron Warke, Chief Justice至少有1個女兒。她去世於1262年4月10日在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德瓦可。

zh-hans.Alnwick, Northumberland, England: 英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Longespée于大约1209年出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，她的父亲William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury34岁，母亲Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury24岁。她和Robert de Ros 1st Baron Warke, Chief Justice至少有1个女儿。她去世于1262年4月10日在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德瓦可。

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Longespée was born about 1209, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, was 34 and her mother, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, was 24. She had at least 1 daughter with Robert de Ros 1st Baron Warke, Chief Justice. She died on 10 April 1262, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Wark, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Longespée est née environ 1209, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Robert de Ros 1st Baron Warke, Chief Justice. Elle est décédée le 10 avril 1262, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Wark, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Longespée um 1209 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury 34 und ihre Mutter Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury 24. Sie hatte mit Robert de Ros 1st Baron Warke, Chief Justice mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 10. April 1262 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Alnwick, Northumberland, England und wurde in Wark, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Longespée è nata il circa 1209 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Robert de Ros 1st Baron Warke, Chief Justice. Morì il 10 aprile 1262, nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Wark, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Alnwick, Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィック
ja.Chippenham, Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイアチップエンハム
ja.Wark, Northumberland Unitary Authority,: イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドワーク
ja.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリー
ja.lifeSummary: Mary Longespéeが約1209年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisburyは34歳，母Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisburyは24歳であった。彼女はRobert de Ros 1st Baron Warke, Chief Justiceとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1262年4月10日にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドワークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Longespée(이)가 대략 1209년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Robert de Ros 1st Baron Warke, Chief Justice(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1262년 4월 10일 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 워크에 묻혔다.

mn.Wark, Northumberland Unitary Authority,: Wark, Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Longespée nasceu aproximadamente 1209, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Robert de Ros 1st Baron Warke, Chief Justice. Ela faleceu em 10 de abril de 1262, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Wark, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Longespée родилась около 1209 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, 24. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Robert de Ros 1st Baron Warke, Chief Justice. Она умерла 10 апреля 1262 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности варк, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Longespée nació aproximadamente 1209, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Robert de Ros 1st Baron Warke, Chief Justice. Murió el 10 de abril de 1262, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Wark, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
